channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-1851] lustre-rsync-test test 2a: BUG: scheduling while atomic: ll_ost_io00_009/11559/0x10000100
item.description:
03:50:23:Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: == lustre-rsync-test test 2a: Replicate files created by dbench. == 03:50:11 (1346928611)
03:50:23:skb_over_panic: text:ffffffffa0109de1 len:650 put:650 head:(null) data:(null) tail:0x28a end:0x0 dev:<NULL>
03:50:23:BUG: scheduling while atomic: ll_ost_io00_009/11559/0x10000100
03:50:23:Modules linked in: osd_ldiskfs(U) fsfilt_ldiskfs(U) ldiskfs(U) lustre(U) ofd(U) ost(U) cmm(U) mdt(U) mdd(U) mds(U) mgs(U) jbd2 obdecho(U) mgc(U) lquota(U) lov(U) osc(U) mdc(U) lmv(U) fid(U) fld(U) ptlrpc(U) obdclass(U) lvfs(U) ksocklnd(U) lnet(U) sha512_generic sha256_generic libcfs(U) nfsd lockd nfs_acl auth_rpcgss exportfs autofs4 sunrpc ib_ipoib rdma_ucm ib_ucm ib_uverbs ib_umad rdma_cm ib_cm iw_cm ib_addr ipv6 ib_sa ib_mad ib_core microcode virtio_balloon 8139too 8139cp mii i2c_piix4 i2c_core ext3 jbd mbcache virtio_blk virtio_pci virtio_ring virtio pata_acpi ata_generic ata_piix dm_mirror dm_region_hash dm_log dm_mod [last unloaded: speedstep_lib]
03:50:23:CPU 0

lustre-rsync-test test 2a:
item.summary: lustre-rsync-test test 2a: BUG: scheduling while atomic: ll_ost_io00_009/11559/0x10000100

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment: This could be related to LU-1883.
